news-korea-econ.title: EU pushes for end of Iran war in a manner where 'everybody saves face'
news-korea-econ.description: The European Union is reportedly consulting with Gulf countries about possible ways Iran, Israel and the U.S. could end the war in a manner where "everybody saves face."

news-global-econ.title: Trump Is Making Europe and Japan Pay Their Fair Share
news-global-econ.description:
While U.S. patients and taxpayers foot the bill for the world’s most advanced medicines, wealthy nations have been freeloading off our innovation.
The post Trump Is Making Europe and Japan Pay Their Fair Share appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: The sound of freedom: Cuba’s regime is running out of time — now the US must act
news-global-econ.description: Cuban-American congressman calls for firm US strategy as Cuba's economy crumbles. No economic lifelines without political change demanded from regime.

news-global-econ.title: Carville predicts Trump will leave office next year out of frustration after midterms
news-global-econ.description: Democratic strategist James Carville claims in new video that President Donald Trump will quit office next year as his initiatives fail and Democrats control House and Senate.

news-global-econ.title: Trump’s Strait showdown: Five bold moves to crush the Iran threat now
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump predicts commercial traffic will resume through the Strait of Hormuz within weeks as Operation Epic Fury targets Iranian forces.

news-global-econ.title: BROOKE ROLLINS, ROBERT KENNEDY JR: We’re bringing families more healthy foods in a SNAP
news-global-econ.description: USDA finalizes rule hiking healthy food requirements for SNAP retailers from 12 to 28 varieties under Trump's leadership to combat chronic health issues.

news-global-soc.title: Fiery aftermath of Iran missile strike near Tel Aviv caught on video after 2 killed
news-global-soc.description: Video footage captured fiery destruction and emergency crews responding after an Iranian missile strike near Tel Aviv, Israel, killed two people.

news-global-soc.title: Iranian wrestler who saw Ayatollah abuse athletes defends American women speaking out against trans inclusion
news-global-soc.description: Iranian wrestling champion Sardar Pashaei urges International Olympic Committee to protect women's sports and create equal competition opportunities for all athletes.

news-global-soc.title: Israel kills Iranian intelligence minister who survived initial strike, official says
news-global-soc.description: Iran’s Intelligence Minister Esmaeil Khatib was killed in an Israeli strike, a senior Israeli official told Fox News.

news-global-soc.title: Kash Patel set to tout crucial FBI reforms that many Americans may not know about: 'Real security'
news-global-soc.description: Patel plans to defend an FBI overhaul he says is restoring the bureau's law enforcement mission as he appears before US Senators for a hearing on global security threats.
